# Load the provided JSON files and search for the given span.
import json, re, unicodedata, math, sys, os
qpath = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
hpath = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(qpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    q = json.load(f)
with open(hpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    h = json.load(f)

len(q), len(h)[:5] if isinstance(h, list) else type(h)

print(type(q), len(q))
print(type(h), isinstance(h, list))
# show first items keys
print("first q item keys:", list(q[0].keys())[:20])
print("sample q[0]:", q[0].get('ayah_text')[:100])
print("first 3 hadith items keys:", list(h[0].keys())[:40])
print("sample hadith hadithTxt (if present):", h[0].get('hadithTxt')[:200] if isinstance(h[0].get('hadithTxt'), str) else None)

target = "الرجال قوامون على النساء بما فضل الله بعضهم على بعض وبما أنفقوا من أموالهم"
matches = [item for item in q if target in item.get('ayah_text','')]
len(matches), matches[:3]

# normalization functions
import re
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')  # includes tashkeel ranges
tatweel = re.compile(r'ـ')
non_letters = re.compile(r'[^ء-ي0-9]')  # allow Arabic letters and digits
hamza_map = str.maketrans({'أ':'ا','إ':'ا','آ':'ا','ؤ':'و','ئ':'ي'})  # basic hamza unification

def normalize_ar(text):
    if text is None:
        return ''
    s = text
    s = s.translate(hamza_map)
    s = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', s)
    s = re.sub(tatweel, '', s)
    # remove punctuation but keep letters and digits and spaces
    # first replace punctuation with spaces
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # convert underscores etc to spaces
    s = s.replace('_',' ')
    # normalize spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s)
    s = s.strip().lower()
    return s

norm_target = normalize_ar(target)
norm_target[:200]

candidates = []
for item in q:
    text = item.get('ayah_text','')
    ntext = normalize_ar(text)
    if norm_target in ntext or ntext in norm_target:
        candidates.append(item)
len(candidates)

content.text: {"correction":"الرِّجَالُ قَوَّامُونَ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ بِمَا فَضَّلَ اللَّهُ بَعْضَهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ وَبِمَا أَنْفَقُوا مِنْ أَمْوَالِهِمْ ۚ فَالصَّالِحَاتُ قَانِتَاتٌ حَافِظَاتٌ لِلْغَيْبِ بِمَا حَفِظَ اللَّهُ ۚ وَاللَّاتِي تَخَافُونَ نُشُوزَهُنَّ فَعِظُوهُنَّ وَاهْجُرُوهُنَّ فِي الْمَضَاجِعِ وَاضْرِبُوهُنَّ ۖ فَإِنْ أَطَعْنَكُمْ فَلَا تَبْغُوا عَلَيْهِنَّ سَبِيلًا ۗ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيًّا كَبِيرًا"}
